entity.summary: Decentralized exchange candidate identified in the HEI verified-unadded backlog from CoinPaprika, CoinGecko, and DefiLlama source data and currently treated as an active DEX record.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded backlog rows hei_unadded_0020 through hei_unadded_0023. Source evidence is limited to CoinPaprika, CoinGecko, and DefiLlama database references, so this record should be improved later if stronger official-history evidence is found. File slug is normalized as nine-mm while preserving 9mm as canonical_name.

events.title: 9mm present in exchange and DEX source data
events.description: 9mm appeared in the verified-unadded candidate generator from CoinPaprika, CoinGecko, and DefiLlama source data as an exchange-like DEX candidate not found in current HEI records.
events.notes: This is a database-reference event, not a verified launch event. Replace with a proper launch/history event if stronger sources are added.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchanges reference for 9mm
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0020, identifying 9mm as an exchange-like source candidate.

evidence.title: DefiLlama DEX overview reference for 9mm
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog rows hei_unadded_0021 and hei_unadded_0022, identifying 9mm V2/V3 as DEX candidates.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchanges reference for 9mm V3
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0023, with domain dex.9mm.pro and source id 9mm-v3.
